title: 10 best herbal tinctures for hemorrhoids
description: Slippery elm tinctures helps with hemorrhoids because its mucilaginous properties soothe and calm irritated tissues, reducing inflammation and discomfort. The tincture's demulcent action forms a protective barrier on the affected area, shielding it from further irritation and promoting healing. Additionally, slippery elm's anti-inflammatory compounds help to constrict bleeding vessels and reduce swelling, providing rapid relief from hemorrhoidal symptoms such as pain, itching, and blee...
